_notes: Canonical MCP server config for databricks. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.
_connection_model: Authenticated HTTP MCPs (interactive OAuth, e.g. asset-broker) are consumed as Cowork workspace connectors — do NOT declare them here; a plugin-declared OAuth MCP can only auth via a localhost loopback that fails in remote sessions. Only no-auth HTTP MCPs (stromy-format) and stdio servers belong in a plugin. See infra-docs/ai/mcp-connection-model.md (enforced by validate-plugin-completeness.py Invariant #13).

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills fetched at runtime via fs_read from the stromy-format MCP.
